1	package main
2	
3	import (
4		"html/template"
5		"log"
6		"path/filepath"
7		"time"
8	
9		"campus-portal/internal/auth"
10		"campus-portal/internal/config"
11		"campus-portal/internal/handlers"
12		"campus-portal/internal/middleware"
13		"campus-portal/internal/models"
14		"campus-portal/internal/services"
15		tmpl "campus-portal/internal/templates"
16	
17		"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
18	)
19	
20	func main() {
21		cfg := config.Load()
22	
23		// Initialize field encryption
24		if err := services.InitEncryption(); err != nil {
25			log.Fatalf("Failed to initialize encryption: %v", err)
26		}
27	
28		// Database
29		db := models.InitDB(cfg)
30		models.AutoMigrate(db)
31		models.SeedDefaults(db)
32	
33		// Services
34		authSvc := auth.NewAuthService(db)
35		auditSvc := services.NewAuditService(db)
36		webhookSvc := services.NewWebhookService(db)
37		healthSvc := services.NewHealthService(db, auditSvc, cfg.UploadDir)
38		bookingSvc := services.NewBookingService(db, auditSvc, webhookSvc)
39		menuSvc := services.NewMenuService(db, auditSvc)
40		reportingSvc := services.NewReportingService(db, cfg.CacheTTL)
41	
42		// Handlers
43		authHandler := handlers.NewAuthHandler(authSvc, auditSvc, db, cfg)
44		healthHandler := handlers.NewHealthHandler(healthSvc, auditSvc)
45		bookingHandler := handlers.NewBookingHandler(bookingSvc, db)
46		menuHandler := handlers.NewMenuHandler(menuSvc)
47		adminHandler := handlers.NewAdminHandler(reportingSvc, webhookSvc)
48	
49		// Background workers
50		csvWatcher := services.NewCSVWatcher(db, cfg.WatchedDir)
51		csvWatcher.Start()
52		defer csvWatcher.Stop()
53	
54		go func() {
55			ticker := time.NewTicker(1 * time.Minute)
56			defer ticker.Stop()
57			for range ticker.C {
58				authSvc.RevertExpiredAccess()
59			}
60		}()
61	
62		go func() {
63			ticker := time.NewTicker(cfg.MVRefreshInterval)
64			defer ticker.Stop()
65			for range ticker.C {
66				reportingSvc.RefreshMaterializedViews()
67				reportingSvc.CleanupSlowQueryLogs(30)
68			}
69		}()
70	
71		// Router
72		r := gin.Default()
73		htmlTemplates := template.Must(
74			template.New("").Funcs(tmpl.FuncMap()).ParseGlob(
75				filepath.Join("internal", "templates", "*.html"),
76			),
77		)
78		r.SetHTMLTemplate(htmlTemplates)
79		r.Static("/static", "./static")
80		r.MaxMultipartMemory = cfg.MaxUploadMB << 20
81	
82		// Global middleware
83		r.Use(middleware.RateLimit(cfg.RateLimitPerMin))
84		r.Use(middleware.SlowQueryLogger(db, cfg.SlowQueryMs))
85	
86		// Public routes
87		r.GET("/login", authHandler.LoginPage)
88		r.POST("/login", authHandler.Login)
89	
90		// ===================== Browser (session-authenticated) routes =====================
91		authed := r.Group("/")
92		authed.Use(middleware.AuthRequired(authSvc))
93		authed.Use(middleware.DataScope())
94		authed.Use(middleware.CSRFProtect())
95		{
96			authed.GET("/", func(c *gin.Context) { c.Redirect(302, "/dashboard") })
97			authed.GET("/logout", authHandler.Logout)
98	
99			// Token issuance (session-auth users can get an API token)
100			authed.POST("/api/tokens", authHandler.IssueToken)
101	
102			// Dashboard + document access (all roles)
103			authed.GET("/dashboard", healthHandler.DashboardPage)
104			authed.GET("/health/download/:id", healthHandler.DownloadAttachment)
105			authed.GET("/health/history", healthHandler.RecordHistory)
106	
107			// Self-upload: students/faculty can upload documents to their OWN record only.
108			// The handler enforces self-only for student/faculty, scoped for clinician/admin.
109			authed.POST("/health/upload", healthHandler.UploadAttachment)
110	
111			// Health record mutations — clinician/admin only (staff cannot modify PHI)
112			healthMut := authed.Group("/health")
113			healthMut.Use(middleware.RequireRole(models.RoleClinician, models.RoleAdmin))
114			{
115				healthMut.POST("/update", healthHandler.UpdateHealthRecord)
116			}
117	
118			// Clinician routes
119			clinician := authed.Group("/clinician")
120			clinician.Use(middleware.RequireRole(models.RoleClinician, models.RoleAdmin))
121			{
122				clinician.GET("", healthHandler.ClinicianPage)
123				clinician.POST("/encounter", healthHandler.CreateEncounter)
124				clinician.POST("/vitals", healthHandler.RecordVitals)
125			}
126	
127			// Booking page routes (browser)
128			authed.GET("/bookings", bookingHandler.BookingPage)
129			authed.POST("/bookings", bookingHandler.CreateBooking)
130			authed.POST("/bookings/:id/transition", bookingHandler.TransitionBooking)
131			authed.GET("/bookings/:id/audit", bookingHandler.BookingAudit)
132	
133			// Menu page routes (browser)
134			authed.GET("/menu", menuHandler.MenuPage)
135			authed.POST("/menu/order", menuHandler.CreateOrder)
136	
137			// Menu management — staff/admin only
138			menuManage := authed.Group("/menu/manage")
139			menuManage.Use(middleware.RequireRole(models.RoleStaff, models.RoleAdmin))
140			{
141				menuManage.GET("", menuHandler.MenuManagePage)
142				menuManage.POST("/category", menuHandler.CreateCategory)
143				menuManage.POST("/item", menuHandler.CreateMenuItem)
144				menuManage.POST("/item/:id/sold-out", menuHandler.ToggleSoldOut)
145				menuManage.POST("/item/:id/sell-windows", menuHandler.SetSellWindows)
146				menuManage.POST("/item/:id/substitutes", menuHandler.SetSubstitutes)
147				menuManage.POST("/item/:id/choices", menuHandler.AddChoice)
148				menuManage.POST("/blackout", menuHandler.CreateBlackout)
149				menuManage.POST("/blackout/:id/delete", menuHandler.DeleteBlackout)
150				menuManage.POST("/promotion", menuHandler.CreatePromotion)
151			}
152	
153			// Admin routes
154			admin := authed.Group("/admin")
155			admin.Use(middleware.RequireRole(models.RoleAdmin))
156			{
157				admin.GET("/users", authHandler.UsersPage)
158				admin.GET("/register", authHandler.RegisterPage)
159				admin.POST("/register", authHandler.Register)
160				admin.POST("/users/:id/toggle", authHandler.ToggleUser)
161				admin.POST("/users/:id/role", authHandler.ChangeRole)
162				admin.POST("/users/:id/temp-access", authHandler.GrantTempAccess)
163				admin.POST("/users/:id/reset-password", authHandler.ResetPassword)
164				admin.GET("/performance", adminHandler.PerformancePage)
165				admin.POST("/refresh-views", adminHandler.RefreshViews)
166				admin.GET("/webhooks", adminHandler.WebhooksPage)
167				admin.POST("/webhooks", adminHandler.RegisterWebhook)
168				admin.GET("/bookings", bookingHandler.AllBookingsPage)
169			}
170		}
171	
172		// ===================== REST API (token + HMAC) routes =====================
173		// Per prompt: "all API access uses locally issued tokens, HMAC request signing, and rate limiting"
174		api := r.Group("/api")
175		api.Use(middleware.APITokenRequired(authSvc))
176		api.Use(middleware.HMACAuth(cfg.HMACSecret))
177		api.Use(middleware.DataScope())
178		{
179			api.GET("/slots", bookingHandler.GetSlots)
180			api.GET("/match-partners", bookingHandler.MatchPartners)
181			api.GET("/check-conflicts", bookingHandler.CheckConflicts)
182			api.GET("/price", menuHandler.CalculatePrice)
183		}
184	
185		// ===================== Internal routes (token + HMAC + admin RBAC) =====================
186		internal := r.Group("/api/internal")
187		internal.Use(middleware.APITokenRequired(authSvc))
188		internal.Use(middleware.HMACAuth(cfg.HMACSecret))
189		internal.Use(middleware.DataScope())
190		internal.Use(middleware.RequireRole(models.RoleAdmin))
191		{
192			internal.GET("/clinic-utilization", adminHandler.APIClinicUtilization)
193			internal.GET("/booking-fill-rates", adminHandler.APIBookingFillRates)
194			internal.GET("/menu-sell-through", adminHandler.APIMenuSellThrough)
195			internal.POST("/webhooks/receive", func(c *gin.Context) {
196				var payload map[string]interface{}
197				if err := c.BindJSON(&payload); err != nil {
198					c.JSON(400, gin.H{"error": "invalid payload"})
199					return
200				}
201				eventType, _ := payload["event_type"].(string)
202				log.Printf("Webhook received: event_type=%s", eventType)
203				c.JSON(200, gin.H{"status": "received"})
204			})
205		}
206	
207		log.Printf("Campus Portal starting on :%s", cfg.ServerPort)
208		if err := r.Run(":" + cfg.ServerPort); err != nil {
209			log.Fatalf("Server failed: %v", err)
210		}
211	}

1	# Campus Wellness & Training Operations Portal
2	
3	A university-run health clinic and athletics department operations portal designed to function entirely on an internal network. Built with Go (Gin), HTML/CSS/JS, and PostgreSQL.
4	
5	---
6	
7	## Table of Contents
8	
9	- [Overview](#overview)
10	- [Tech Stack](#tech-stack)
11	- [Quick Start](#quick-start)
12	- [Default Login Credentials](#default-login-credentials)
13	- [Project Structure](#project-structure)
14	- [Architecture](#architecture)
15	- [Feature Inventory](#feature-inventory)
16	  - [Phase 1: Shared Core & Security](#phase-1-shared-core--security)
17	  - [Phase 2: Health & Clinician Module](#phase-2-health--clinician-module)
18	  - [Phase 3: Athletics & Training Scheduler](#phase-3-athletics--training-scheduler)
19	  - [Phase 4: Menu & Logistics Dining Hub](#phase-4-menu--logistics-dining-hub)
20	  - [Phase 5: System Integration & Performance](#phase-5-system-integration--performance)
21	- [Database Schema](#database-schema)
22	- [API Endpoints](#api-endpoints)
23	- [Security Features](#security-features)
24	- [Configuration](#configuration)
25	- [Original Prompt](#original-prompt)
26	
27	---
28	
29	## Overview
30	
31	This portal serves as a centralized system for campus wellness operations spanning:
32	
33	- **Health clinic** management (records, vitals, encounters, document uploads)
34	- **Athletics** training session booking with partner matching
35	- **Dining** menu management tied to training events
36	- **Administration** with role-based access control, audit logging, and performance monitoring
37	
38	The system is designed for **fully offline/internal network** deployment with no external dependencies.
39	
40	---
41	
42	## Tech Stack
43	
44	| Layer      | Technology                        |
45	|------------|-----------------------------------|
46	| Language   | Go 1.21+                          |
47	| Web Server | Gin                               |
48	| Frontend   | Templ + Go html/template + vanilla JS/CSS |
49	| Database   | PostgreSQL 16                     |
50	| Auth       | bcrypt + session cookies + locally-issued API tokens |
51	| Container  | Docker / Docker Compose           |
52	
53	---
54	
55	## Quick Start
56	
57	```bash
58	docker compose up --build
59	```
60	
61	Then open **http://localhost:8080** in your browser.
62	
63	That single command:
64	1. Starts a PostgreSQL 16 container with healthcheck
65	2. Builds the Go 1.21+ binary in a multi-stage Docker build (includes Templ code generation)
66	3. Auto-generates secrets for session signing, HMAC, and field encryption (with startup warnings)
67	4. Runs database migrations (GORM AutoMigrate + vitals partitioning + materialized views)
68	5. Seeds default organizations, departments, venues, users, menu categories, and menu items
69	6. Starts the Gin web server on port 8080
70	
71	No `.env` file or manual setup is required. All secrets are auto-generated for development. For production, override them via environment variables (see [Configuration](#configuration)).
72	
73	To stop:
74	```bash
75	docker compose down
76	```
77	
78	To stop and wipe all data (fresh start):
79	```bash
80	docker compose down -v
81	```
82	
83	### Running Tests
84	
85	```bash
86	# Run all tests (requires PostgreSQL from Docker Compose to be running)
87	bash run_tests.sh
88	
89	# Run only unit tests (no database required)
90	bash run_tests.sh --unit
91	```
92	
93	### Local Development (without Docker)
94	
95	1. **Install PostgreSQL 16** and create the database:
96	   ```sql
97	   CREATE USER campus_admin WITH PASSWORD 'campus_secret';
98	   CREATE DATABASE campus_portal OWNER campus_admin;
99	   ```
100	
101	2. **Run the server** (all config has sensible defaults):
102	   ```bash
103	   go run ./cmd/server
104	   ```
105	
106	3. **Run tests:**
107	   ```bash
108	   go test ./... -v
109	   ```
110	
111	### Templ Integration
112	
113	The project uses the `a-h/templ` library for component-based server-rendered HTML as specified by the prompt. Templ components are in `internal/views/*.templ` and compiled to Go code via the `templ` CLI during the Docker build. The login page and layout are Templ-rendered. Remaining pages use Go's `html/template` with the Templ rendering infrastructure (`views.Render()`) available for all handlers.
114	
115	---
116	
117	## Default Login Credentials
118	
119	All seed accounts use the password **`password123`**
120	
121	| Username    | Role       | Department       |
122	|-------------|------------|------------------|
123	| `admin`     | Admin      | —                |
124	| `student`   | Student    | —                |
125	| `faculty`   | Faculty    | —                |
126	| `clinician` | Clinician  | General Medicine |
127	| `labtech`   | Clinician  | Laboratory       |
128	| `staff`     | Staff      | Dining Services  |
129	| `trainer`   | Staff      | Athletics        |
130	
131	---
132	
133	## Project Structure
134	
135	```
136	Task-20/
137	├── cmd/
138	│   └── server/
139	│       └── main.go                  # Entry point, router, background workers
140	├── internal/
141	│   ├── auth/
142	│   │   └── auth.go                  # Session auth, login, register, temp access
143	│   ├── config/
144	│   │   └── config.go                # Environment-based configuration
145	│   ├── handlers/
146	│   │   ├── admin_handlers.go        # Performance dashboard, webhooks, reporting APIs
147	│   │   ├── auth_handlers.go         # Login/logout pages, user management, temp access
148	│   │   ├── booking_handlers.go      # Training session booking, slots, partner matching
149	│   │   ├── health_handlers.go       # Health dashboard, vitals, encounters, file upload
150	│   │   └── menu_handlers.go         # Menu browsing, management, ordering, pricing
151	│   ├── middleware/
152	│   │   └── middleware.go            # AuthRequired, RBAC, DataScope, HMAC, rate limiter
153	│   ├── models/
154	│   │   ├── database.go              # DB init with retry, AutoMigrate, seed data
155	│   │   └── models.go                # All GORM models (27 tables)
156	│   ├── services/
157	│   │   ├── audit.go                 # Immutable audit log with SHA-256 fingerprints
158	│   │   ├── booking.go               # Slot engine, partner matching, conflict detection
159	│   │   ├── health.go                # Health records, vitals, encounters, file storage
160	│   │   ├── integration.go           # CSV watcher, webhooks, reporting, PII masking
161	│   │   └── menu.go                  # Categories, items, pricing engine, sell windows
162	│   └── templates/
163	│       ├── funcs.go                 # Custom template functions (divf, deref)
164	│       ├── layout.html              # Base layout with role-aware navbar
165	│       ├── login.html               # Login page
166	│       ├── dashboard.html           # Health dashboard (vitals, records, uploads)
167	│       ├── clinician.html           # Clinician encounter/vitals forms with draft save
168	│       ├── bookings.html            # Training session booking with calendar
169	│       ├── bookings_admin.html      # Admin view of all bookings
170	│       ├── menu.html                # Dining menu with ordering
171	│       ├── menu_manage.html         # Menu management (categories, items, sell windows)
172	│       ├── admin_users.html         # User management (activate, roles, temp access)
173	│       ├── admin_performance.html   # Performance dashboard (slow queries, reports)
174	│       ├── admin_webhooks.html      # Webhook endpoint management
175	│       ├── register.html            # New user registration form
176	│       └── error.html               # Error display page
177	├── static/
178	│   ├── css/
179	│   │   └── style.css                # Complete responsive stylesheet
180	│   └── js/
181	│       └── app.js                   # Client-side validation, drafts, AJAX helpers
182	├── migrations/

184	├── db-init/
185	│   └── 01-extensions.sql            # Postgres init script (pgcrypto extension)
186	├── uploads/                         # Runtime: uploaded documents stored here
187	├── watched_folder/                  # Runtime: CSV drop folder for enrollment imports
188	├── internal/
189	│   └── views/

191	│       ├── layout_templ.go          # Generated Go code from Templ
192	│       └── render.go                # Templ-to-Gin rendering bridge
193	├── Dockerfile                       # Multi-stage Go 1.21+ build with Templ generation
194	├── docker-compose.yml               # Postgres + App orchestration (zero-config)
195	├── .dockerignore                    # Build context exclusions
196	├── .gitignore                       # Git exclusions (.env, binaries)
197	├── Makefile                         # Build/test/run targets
198	├── setup.sh                         # Optional: generates .env with random secrets

203	
204	---
205	
206	## Architecture
207	
208	```
209	┌─────────────┐     ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────┐
210	│   Browser    │────▶│              Gin Router (port 8080)          │
211	│  (HTML/CSS/  │◀────│                                              │
212	│   JS)        │     │  Middleware Stack:                           │
213	└─────────────┘     │  ├─ Rate Limiter (60 req/min per IP)        │
214	                     │  ├─ HMAC Auth (internal API routes)         │
215	                     │  ├─ Session Auth (cookie-based)             │
216	                     │  ├─ RBAC (role check per route group)       │
217	                     │  └─ Data Scope (self/dept/org filtering)    │
218	                     │                                              │
219	                     │  Route Groups:                               │
220	                     │  ├─ Public: /login                          │
221	                     │  ├─ Authed: /dashboard, /bookings, /menu    │
222	                     │  ├─ Clinician: /clinician/*                 │
223	                     │  ├─ Staff: /menu/manage/*                   │
224	                     │  ├─ Admin: /admin/*                         │
225	                     │  └─ Internal API: /api/internal/* (HMAC)    │
226	                     └──────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘
227	                                    │
228	                     ┌──────────────▼───────────────────────────────┐
229	                     │           Service Layer                      │
230	                     │  ├─ AuthService     (sessions, temp access)  │
231	                     │  ├─ HealthService   (records, vitals, files) │
232	                     │  ├─ BookingService  (slots, matching, FSM)   │
233	                     │  ├─ MenuService     (pricing, sell windows)  │
234	                     │  ├─ AuditService    (immutable revisions)    │
235	                     │  ├─ WebhookService  (dispatch + delivery)    │
236	                     │  ├─ ReportingService(mat views, cache)       │
237	                     │  └─ CSVWatcher      (folder polling)         │
238	                     └──────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘
239	                                    │
240	                     ┌──────────────▼───────────────────────────────┐
241	                     │         PostgreSQL 16 (GORM)                 │
242	                     │  27 tables + 3 materialized views            │
243	                     │  Indexes on all foreign keys & query paths   │
244	                     └──────────────────────────────────────────────┘
245	```
246	
247	**Background Workers (goroutines):**
248	- Temp access revert ticker (every 1 minute)

475	---
476	
477	## Authentication Model
478	
479	The system uses two auth methods:
480	
481	| Method | Scope | How it works |
482	|--------|-------|-------------|
483	| **Session cookies** | Browser pages (`/dashboard`, `/bookings`, `/menu`, etc.) | Login via `/login` sets an `HttpOnly` `session_id` cookie (24h expiry). CSRF double-submit cookie protects POST forms. |
484	| **API tokens + HMAC** | All REST API endpoints (`/api/*`) | Requires both Bearer token AND HMAC-signed request. Token issued via `POST /api/tokens` (session-auth). HMAC uses `X-HMAC-Signature`, `X-HMAC-Timestamp`, `X-Body-SHA256` headers. Body hash verified from actual bytes. |
485	
486	All routes under `/api/*` (including `/api/internal/*`) require a locally-issued **Bearer token** AND **HMAC-signed requests** — session cookies are not accepted. Browser pages that need API data obtain a token + HMAC secret via `POST /api/tokens`, then sign each request client-side. Additionally, `/api/internal/*` routes require **admin role** and return **org-scoped data only**. Rate limiting applies globally at 60 req/min per client IP.
487	
488	---
489	
490	## Security Features
491	
492	| Feature | Implementation |
493	|---------|----------------|
494	| Password hashing | bcrypt with default cost |
495	| Session tokens | 32 random bytes → 64-char hex string, 24h expiry, invalidated on role change/deactivation |
496	| RBAC | Per-route-group middleware checking user role |
497	| Data scoping | Students see own data only; clinicians see dept; admin sees org |
498	| Temporary access | Auto-reverts via background ticker (checked every 1 min) |
499	| HMAC request signing | SHA-256 HMAC of `method:path:timestamp`, 5-min window |
500	| Rate limiting | 60 requests/minute per client IP, sliding window |
501	| CSRF protection | Per-session token validated on all state-changing POST requests |
502	| File upload validation | Server-side: 10MB max, allowlisted MIME types only, scope-checked |
503	| File integrity | SHA-256 fingerprint stored for every uploaded file |
504	| Audit trail | Immutable log with SHA-256 fingerprint per revision, scope-enforced |
505	| At-rest encryption | AES-256-GCM for SSN, health record fields (allergies, conditions, medications) |
506	| PII masking | SSN: `***-**-1234`; Email: `ja***@domain` (role-based display) |
507	| Secret management | SESSION_KEY, HMAC_SECRET, FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY auto-generated with warnings if not set |
508	| SQL injection | Prevented by GORM parameterized queries |
509	| XSS | Prevented by Go html/template auto-escaping |
510	| Webhook security | Receiver endpoint moved under HMAC-protected `/api/internal/` prefix |
511	| Login CSRF | Separate `login_csrf` cookie + hidden form field for pre-auth CSRF protection |
512	| Session invalidation | All user sessions destroyed on role change or account deactivation |
513	| Draft data clearing | `sessionStorage` drafts cleared on logout; tab-scoped (clears on tab close) |
514	| File magic bytes | Server validates actual file content via `http.DetectContentType()`, not just Content-Type header |
515	| Input validation | Vitals ranges, menu prices/discounts, sell window times, text field lengths all validated server-side |
516	| Admin audit trail | Role changes, account toggles, temp access grants, user creation all produce immutable audit records |
517	| Auth failure logging | `AUTH_FAILURE`, `SESSION_INVALID`, `RBAC_DENIED` events logged with user/IP context |
518	
519	---
520	
521	## Configuration
522	
523	All settings are configured via environment variables. Everything has sensible defaults for development — `docker compose up --build` works with zero configuration.
524	
525	| Variable | Default | Description |
526	|----------|---------|-------------|
527	| `DB_HOST` | `localhost` | PostgreSQL host |
528	| `DB_PORT` | `5432` | PostgreSQL port |
529	| `DB_USER` | `campus_admin` | Database username |
530	| `DB_PASSWORD` | `campus_secret` | Database password |
531	| `DB_NAME` | `campus_portal` | Database name |
532	| `DB_SSLMODE` | `disable` | SSL mode for DB connection |
533	| `SERVER_PORT` | `8080` | Web server port |
534	| `SESSION_KEY` | (auto-generated) | Session signing key (hex, 64 chars) |
535	| `HMAC_SECRET` | (auto-generated) | HMAC signing key (hex, 64 chars) |
536	| `FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY` | (auto-generated) | AES-256 key for PHI encryption (base64, 32 bytes) |
537	| `SECURE_COOKIES` | `false` | Set `true` when serving behind TLS |
538	| `UPLOAD_DIR` | `./uploads` | File upload storage path |
539	| `WATCHED_DIR` | `./watched_folder` | CSV import watch path |
540	| `GIN_MODE` | `release` | Gin framework mode |
541	
542	**Production deployment:** All default credentials (`campus_admin`/`campus_secret`, seed password `password123`) must be changed. Generate secrets with `openssl rand -base64 32` for `FIELD_ENCRYPTION_KEY` and `openssl rand -hex 32` for `SESSION_KEY`/`HMAC_SECRET`. Pass them as environment variables or via a `.env` file.
543	
544	---

21	func (s *AuditService) LogChange(tableName string, recordID uint, action string, editorID uint, reason string, snapshot interface{}) error {
22		data, err := json.Marshal(snapshot)
23		if err != nil {
24			return err
25		}
26	
27		fingerprint := models.ComputeFingerprint(fmt.Sprintf("%s:%d:%s:%d:%s", tableName, recordID, action, editorID, string(data)))
28	
29		entry := &models.AuditLog{
30			TableName:   tableName,
31			RecordID:    recordID,
32			Action:      action,
33			EditorID:    editorID,
34			Reason:      reason,
35			Fingerprint: fingerprint,
36			Snapshot:    string(data),
37			Timestamp:   time.Now(),
38		}
39	
40		return s.DB.Create(entry).Error
41	}

43	func (s *AuditService) GetHistory(tableName string, recordID uint) ([]models.AuditLog, error) {
44		var logs []models.AuditLog
45		err := s.DB.Where("table_name = ? AND record_id = ?", tableName, recordID).
46			Order("timestamp DESC").Find(&logs).Error
47		return logs, err
48	}

All routes under `/api/*` (including `/api/internal/*`) require a locally-issued **Bearer token** AND **HMAC-signed requests** — session cookies are not accepted. Browser pages that need API data obtain a token + HMAC secret via `POST /api/tokens`, then sign each request client-side. Rate limiting applies globally at 60 req/min per client IP.", "new_string": "| **API tokens + HMAC** | All REST API endpoints (`/api/*`) | Requires both Bearer token AND HMAC-signed request. Token issued via `POST /api/tokens` (session-auth). HMAC uses `X-HMAC-Signature`, `X-HMAC-Timestamp`, `X-Body-SHA256` headers. Body hash verified from actual bytes. |

**Policy summary — one consistent rule for all API routes:**

- All routes under `/api/*` (including `/api/internal/*`) require a locally-issued **Bearer token** AND a valid **HMAC-signed request** — session cookies are not accepted on API routes.
- `/api/internal/*` additionally requires **admin role**; responses are always **org-scoped** (the caller's organization_id filters all returned data).
- Internal reporting endpoints (`/api/internal/clinic-utilization`, `/booking-fill-rates`, `/menu-sell-through`) read from **materialized views** refreshed every 15 minutes, with a 5-minute in-memory cache TTL.
- Browser pages that need API data obtain a token via `POST /api/tokens` (session-auth required), then sign each request client-side.
- Rate limiting applies globally at 60 req/min per client IP across all routes."}

+## Authentication Model
+
+The system uses two auth methods:
+
+| Method | Scope | How it works |
+|--------|-------|-------------|
+| **Session cookies** | Browser pages (`/dashboard`, `/bookings`, `/menu`, etc.) | Login via `/login` sets an `HttpOnly` `session_id` cookie (24h expiry). CSRF double-submit cookie protects POST forms. |
+| **API tokens + HMAC** | All REST API endpoints (`/api/*`) | Requires both Bearer token AND HMAC-signed request. Token issued via `POST /api/tokens` (session-auth). HMAC uses `X-HMAC-Signature`, `X-HMAC-Timestamp`, `X-Body-SHA256` headers. Body hash verified from actual bytes. |
+
+**Policy summary — one consistent rule for all API routes:**
+
+- All routes under `/api/*` (including `/api/internal/*`) require a locally-issued **Bearer token** AND a valid **HMAC-signed request** — session cookies are not accepted on API routes.
+- `/api/internal/*` additionally requires **admin role**; responses are always **org-scoped** (the caller's organization_id filters all returned data).
+- Internal reporting endpoints (`/api/internal/clinic-utilization`, `/booking-fill-rates`, `/menu-sell-through`) read from **materialized views** refreshed every 15 minutes, with a 5-minute in-memory cache TTL.
+- Browser pages that need API data obtain a token via `POST /api/tokens` (session-auth required), then sign each request client-side.
+- Rate limiting applies globally at 60 req/min per client IP across all routes.

content.text:
15 new test functions added (from `TestInternalAPI_MissingToken_Returns401` through `TestReportingService_OrgIsolation_NoLeakAcrossOrgs`). All changes compile cleanly.

---

## Final Report

### 1. Summary of Implemented Fixes

**A. Materialized view reporting paths (Issue 1 - Medium priority)**
- Rebuilt all 3 materialized views (`mv_clinic_utilization`, `mv_booking_fill_rates`, `mv_menu_sell_through`) with `organization_id` columns so org-scoped filtering works directly on the precomputed layer.
- Updated `ReportingService.GetClinicUtilization()`, `GetBookingFillRates()`, and `GetMenuSellThrough()` to read from the materialized views instead of querying base tables with ad-hoc JOINs.
- Preserved the scheduled refresh (15 min ticker), REFRESH CONCURRENTLY support (unique indexes updated), and in-memory TTL cache (5 min).

**B. `/api/internal/*` integration test coverage (Issue 2 - High priority)**
- Added `/api/internal/*` routes to the test router (clinic-utilization, booking-fill-rates, menu-sell-through, webhooks) with the full production middleware chain: `APITokenRequired` → `HMACAuth` → `DataScope` → `RequireRole(Admin)`.
- Added 10 new integration tests covering: missing token (401), missing HMAC (401), invalid HMAC (401), non-admin roles (403 for student/clinician/staff), admin success (200 on all 4 endpoints), and multi-org scoping for all 4 report/webhook endpoints.

**C. Clinician encounter org-isolation coverage (Issue 3 - Medium priority)**
- Added 3 service-level tests proving: cross-org encounters don't leak, same-org authorized department returns data, and wrong-department queries return empty for the correct org.

**D. README security wording alignment (Issue 4 - Low priority)**
- Normalized HMAC scope description from "/api/internal/* only" to "all /api/* routes."
- Fixed HMAC signature format from `method:path:timestamp` to `method:path:timestamp:bodyHash`.
- Updated architecture diagram to show `token+HMAC+admin` for internal API.
- Added explicit policy summary block with one consistent rule for all API routes.
- Updated materialized views section to document org columns and confirm reporting reads from views.
- Updated internal API endpoint descriptions to reference specific mat views and org-scoping.

### 2. File-by-File Changes

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `internal/models/database.go` | Drop + recreate 3 mat views with `organization_id` columns; updated unique indexes to include org_id |
| `internal/services/integration.go` | Changed 3 reporting methods to `SELECT ... FROM mv_*` instead of base table queries |
| `internal/handlers/integration_test.go` | Extended test router with `/api/internal/*` routes + reporting/webhook services; added 15 new test functions |
| `README.md` | Normalized HMAC scope, signature format, internal API auth description, mat view documentation, and added policy summary |

### 3. New Migrations Added

None as standalone files. The materialized view schema change is handled in `AutoMigrate()` via `DROP ... IF EXISTS` + `CREATE`, which runs on every startup. This is the existing migration pattern used by the project.

### 4. New Tests Added

| Test | Category | Covers |
|------|----------|--------|
| `TestInternalAPI_MissingToken_Returns401` | Auth gate | 401 on all 4 internal endpoints without token |
| `TestInternalAPI_TokenWithoutHMAC_Returns401` | HMAC gate | 401 when HMAC headers missing |
| `TestInternalAPI_InvalidHMAC_Returns401` | HMAC gate | 401 when HMAC signature is wrong |
| `TestInternalAPI_NonAdminRole_Returns403` | RBAC | 403 for student, clinician, staff |
| `TestInternalAPI_AdminRole_Returns200` | RBAC | 200 for admin on all 4 endpoints |
| `TestInternalAPI_OrgScopedReports_ClinicUtilization` | Org scoping | Multi-org clinic report isolation |
| `TestInternalAPI_OrgScopedReports_BookingFillRates` | Org scoping | Multi-org booking report isolation |
| `TestInternalAPI_OrgScopedReports_MenuSellThrough` | Org scoping | Cross-org menu data denied, same-org data returned |
| `TestInternalAPI_WebhookEndpoints_OrgScoped` | Org scoping | Cross-org webhook endpoint visibility denied |
| `TestClinicianEncounters_OrgIsolation_NoCrossOrgLeak` | Encounter isolation | Same dept name across orgs doesn't leak |
| `TestClinicianEncounters_SameOrgAuthorizedDept_Succeeds` | Encounter isolation | Authorized dept + org returns data |
| `TestClinicianEncounters_DifferentDept_ReturnsEmpty` | Encounter isolation | Wrong dept query returns empty |
| `TestReportingService_QueriesMaterializedViews` | Mat view reads | Reports return data after MV refresh |
| `TestReportingService_RefreshTargetsCorrectViews` | Mat view refresh | All 3 views queryable after refresh |
| `TestReportingService_OrgIsolation_NoLeakAcrossOrgs` | Mat view org scope | MV org filter works correctly |

### 5. Remaining Assumptions or Risks

- **Database required for integration tests**: Tests skip gracefully if Postgres is unavailable (`t.Skipf`). Run `docker compose up -d db` first.
- **Mat view drop+recreate on startup**: The `DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS` runs on every app boot. This is safe (views are transient caches, refreshed every 15 min) but adds ~100ms to startup.
- **Test data isolation**: Multi-org tests create additional orgs/users in the shared test database. If tests run in parallel against the same DB, they may interfere. The test runner uses sequential execution by default.
- **No migration versioning**: The project uses GORM `AutoMigrate` rather than versioned migration files. The mat view schema change follows this existing pattern.

### 6. Exact Commands to Run Validation

```bash
# 1. Build verification (should produce no output = success)
cd repo && go build ./...

# 2. Vet check (should produce no output = success)
go vet ./...

# 3. Start the database (if not running)
docker compose up -d db

# 4. Run all tests (integration + unit)
go test ./... -v -count=1

# 5. Run only the new internal API tests
go test ./internal/handlers/ -v -run "TestInternalAPI" -count=1

# 6. Run only the clinician encounter isolation tests
go test ./internal/handlers/ -v -run "TestClinicianEncounters" -count=1

# 7. Run only the materialized view reporting tests
go test ./internal/handlers/ -v -run "TestReportingService" -count=1

# 8. Full Docker build + boot verification
docker compose up --build
```
